name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ turn' = turn + 1
          /\ turn' <= N
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "critical"]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Coordinator is a single process *)
Coordinator == 1

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
Commit == "Commit"
Abort == "Abort"

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]

(* All messages are stored in a sequence *)
Messages == Seq(Message)

(* Initial state: all participants are in the "Init" state, coordinator is in "Start" state, no messages *)
Init ==
  /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ coordinator = "Start"
  /\ messages = <<>>

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorPrepare ==
  /\ coordinator = "Start"
  /\ coordinator' = "WaitForVotes"
  /\ participants' = participants
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Prepare]) \* for each participant p

(* Participants receive Prepare and vote yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes ==
  /\ \E m \in messages : m.type = Prepare /\ m.receiver \in Participants
  /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "Init" /\ \E m \in messages : m.type = Prepare /\ m.receiver = p
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "VotedYes"]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> VoteYes]) \* for each participant p

(* Coordinator receives all VoteYes and sends Commit *)
CoordinatorCommit ==
  /\ coordinator = "WaitForVotes"
  /\ \A p \in Participants : \E m \in messages : m.type = VoteYes /\ m.receiver = Coordinator /\ m.sender = p
  /\ coordinator' = "CommitSent"
  /\ participants' = participants
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Commit]) \* for each participant p

(* Participants receive Commit and transition to "Committed" *)
ParticipantCommitted ==
  /\ \E m \in messages : m.type = Commit /\ m.receiver \in Participants
  /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VotedYes" /\ \E m \in messages : m.type = Commit /\ m.receiver = p
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> Commit]) \* for each participant p

(* Coordinator receives all Commit acknowledgments and finishes *)
CoordinatorFinish ==
  /\ coordinator = "CommitSent"
  /\ \A p \in Participants : \E m \in messages : m.type = Commit /\ m.receiver = Coordinator /\ m.sender = p
  /\ coordinator' = "Finished"
  /\ participants' = participants
  /\ messages' = messages

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ CoordinatorPrepare
  \/ ParticipantVoteYes
  \/ CoordinatorCommit
  \/ ParticipantCommitted
  \/ CoordinatorFinish

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in [Participants -> {"Init", "VotedYes", "Committed"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"Start", "WaitForVotes", "CommitSent", "Finished"}
  /\ messages \in Messages

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* State: state[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : (state[i] = "thinking" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"])
      \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[If(i = 1, N, i - 1)] = i
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If(i = 1, N, i - 1)] = i]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
      \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If(i = 1, N, i - 1)] = i]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
         /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue *)
Enqueue == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* placeholder value *)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeue *)
Dequeue == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Enqueue \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat : \E newVotedFor \in DOMAIN votedFor :
       /\ state = "Candidate"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = newVotedFor
       /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat : \E newVotedFor \in DOMAIN votedFor :
       /\ state = "Leader"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = newVotedFor
       /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
